sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75023" key="o)rqoto/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-τόνησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use of the unmodified accent,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg001:36:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.6</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0082.tlg001:55:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
